questionHtml: Using your answer to part (i), calculate the increase in government spending necessary to increase nominal GDP by $100 billion.
markschemeHtml:
Change in government spending = 100 2.5

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

= $40 billion

An answer of 40 billion or 40 or $40 billion without any working is sufficient for [1].

OFR applies.
